info.name: List of merge requests associated with a deployment

params.name: id
params.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the project owned by the authenticated user

params.name: page
params.description: Current page number

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of items per page

params.name: deployment_id
params.description: The ID of the deployment

params.name: author_id
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given user `id`. Mutually exclusive with `author_username`. Combine with `scope=all` or `scope=assigned_to_me`.

params.name: author_username
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: assignee_id
params.description: Returns merge requests assigned to the given user `id`. `None` returns unassigned merge requests. `Any` returns merge requests with an assignee.

params.name: assignee_username
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: reviewer_username
params.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given `username`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_id`. Introduced in GitLab 13.8.

params.name: labels
params.description: Returns merge requests matching a comma-separated list of labels. `None` lists all merge requests with no labels. `Any` lists all merge requests with at least one label. Predefined names are case-insensitive.

params.name: milestone
params.description: Returns merge requests for a specific milestone. `None` returns merge requests with no milestone. `Any` returns merge requests that have an assigned milestone.

params.name: my_reaction_emoji
params.description: Returns merge requests reacted by the authenticated user by the given `emoji`. `None` returns issues not given a reaction. `Any` returns issues given at least one reaction.

params.name: reviewer_id
params.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given user `id`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_username`.

params.name: state
params.description: Returns `all` merge requests or just those that are `opened`, `closed`, `locked`, or `merged`.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Returns merge requests ordered by `created_at`, `label_priority`, `milestone_due`, `popularity`, `priority`, `title`, `updated_at` or `merged_at` fields. Introduced in GitLab 14.8.

params.name: sort
params.description: Returns merge requests sorted in `asc` or `desc` order.

params.name: with_labels_details
params.description: If `true`, response returns more details for each label in labels field: `:name`,`:color`, `:description`, `:description_html`, `:text_color`

params.name: with_merge_status_recheck
params.description: If `true`, this projection requests (but does not guarantee) that the `merge_status` field be recalculated asynchronously. Introduced in GitLab 13.0.

params.name: created_after
params.description: Returns merge requests created on or after the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: created_before
params.description: Returns merge requests created on or before the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: updated_after
params.description: Returns merge requests updated on or after the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: updated_before
params.description: Returns merge requests updated on or before the given time. Expected in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: view
params.description: If simple, returns the `iid`, URL, title, description, and basic state of merge request

params.name: scope
params.description: Returns merge requests for the given scope: `created_by_me`, `assigned_to_me`, `reviews_for_me` or `all`

params.name: source_branch
params.description: Returns merge requests with the given source branch

params.name: source_project_id
params.description: Returns merge requests with the given source project id

params.name: target_branch
params.description: Returns merge requests with the given target branch

params.name: search
params.description: Search merge requests against their `title` and `description`.

params.name: in
params.description: Modify the scope of the search attribute. `title`, `description`, or a string joining them with comma.

params.name: wip
params.description: Deprecated. Use `draft` instead. Filter merge requests against their `wip` status. `yes` to return only draft merge requests, `no` to return non-draft merge requests.

params.name: draft
params.description: Filter merge requests against their `draft` status. `true` to return only draft merge requests, `false` to return non-draft merge requests.

params.name: not[author_id]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests created by the given user `id`. Mutually exclusive with `author_username`. Combine with `scope=all` or `scope=assigned_to_me`.

params.name: not[author_username]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: not[assignee_id]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests assigned to the given user `id`. `None` returns unassigned merge requests. `Any` returns merge requests with an assignee.

params.name: not[assignee_username]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: not[reviewer_username]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given `username`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_id`. Introduced in GitLab 13.8.

params.name: not[labels]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests matching a comma-separated list of labels. `None` lists all merge requests with no labels. `Any` lists all merge requests with at least one label. Predefined names are case-insensitive.

params.name: not[milestone]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests for a specific milestone. `None` returns merge requests with no milestone. `Any` returns merge requests that have an assigned milestone.

params.name: not[my_reaction_emoji]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests reacted by the authenticated user by the given `emoji`. `None` returns issues not given a reaction. `Any` returns issues given at least one reaction.

params.name: not[reviewer_id]
params.description: `<Negated>` Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given user `id`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_username`.

params.name: deployed_before
params.description: Returns merge requests deployed before the given date/time. Expected in ISO 8601 format.

params.name: deployed_after
params.description: Returns merge requests deployed after the given date/time. Expected in ISO 8601 format

params.name: environment
params.description: Returns merge requests deployed to the given environment

params.name: approved
params.description: Filters merge requests by their `approved` status. `yes` returns only approved merge requests. `no` returns only non-approved merge requests.

params.name: merge_user_id
params.description: Returns merge requests which have been merged by the user with the given user `id`. Mutually exclusive with `merge_user_username`.

params.name: merge_user_username
params.description: Returns merge requests which have been merged by the user with the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `merge_user_id`.

params.description: The ID or URL-encoded path of the group owned by the authenticated user.

params.name: author_id
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given user `id`. Mutually exclusive with `author_username`. Combine with `scope=all` or `scope=assigned_to_me`.

params.name: author_username
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: assignee_id
params.description: Returns merge requests assigned to the given user `id`. `None` returns unassigned merge requests. `Any` returns merge requests with an assignee.

params.name: assignee_username
params.description: Returns merge requests created by the given `username`. Mutually exclusive with `author_id`.

params.name: reviewer_username
params.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given `username`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_id`. Introduced in GitLab 13.8.

params.name: labels
params.description: Returns merge requests matching a comma-separated list of labels. `None` lists all merge requests with no labels. `Any` lists all merge requests with at least one label. Predefined names are case-insensitive.

params.name: milestone
params.description: Returns merge requests for a specific milestone. `None` returns merge requests with no milestone. `Any` returns merge requests that have an assigned milestone.

params.name: my_reaction_emoji
params.description: Returns merge requests reacted by the authenticated user by the given `emoji`. `None` returns issues not given a reaction. `Any` returns issues given at least one reaction.

params.name: reviewer_id
params.description: Returns merge requests which have the user as a reviewer with the given user `id`. `None` returns merge requests with no reviewers. `Any` returns merge requests with any reviewer. Mutually exclusive with `reviewer_username`.

params.name: state
params.description: Returns `all` merge requests or just those that are `opened`, `closed`, `locked`, or `merged`.

params.name: order_by
params.description: Returns merge requests ordered by `created_at`, `label_priority`, `milestone_due`, `popularity`, `priority`, `title`, `updated_at` or `merged_at` fields. Introduced in GitLab 14.8.

params.name: sort
params.description: Returns merge requests sorted in `asc` or `desc` order.

params.name: with_labels_details
params.description: If `true`, response returns more details for each label in labels field: `:name`,`:color`, `:description`, `:description_html`, `:text_color`

params.name: with_merge_status_recheck
